note: CLIP zero-shot anchors. The trial's site_plan miss (37%) was one overloaded prompt: 'site_plan' bundled situation drawings + cadastral maps + aerial plot photos into one anchor that biased to line-art, so photo/aerial site plans leaked to garden/exterior. Fix: give each visual sub-style its OWN coherent anchor, then COLLAPSE back to the engine's logical labels (toolkit.image_classification.ROOM_TYPES) via `collapse`. CLIP picks argmax over `prompts`; metrics + the engine use the collapsed logical tag. This also unlocks the untagged non-apartment categories (dum/pozemek/komercni, ~166k listings, zero classified today) where plot/cadastral drawings are the property identity.

prompts.kitchen: a photo of a kitchen with cabinets and a countertop
prompts.bathroom: a photo of a bathroom with a shower or bathtub
prompts.toilet: a photo of a separate toilet or WC
prompts.living_room: a photo of a living room with a sofa
prompts.bedroom: a photo of a bedroom with a bed
prompts.hallway: a photo of a hallway, corridor or entrance hall
prompts.exterior_facade: a photo of the outside facade of a residential building
prompts.balcony_terrace: a photo taken on a balcony or terrace
prompts.garden: a photo of a garden, yard or outdoor green space
prompts.floor_plan: an architectural floor plan drawing of the rooms inside an apartment
prompts.situation_plan: an architectural site or situation plan, a line drawing showing building outlines and boundaries on a plot of land
prompts.cadastral_map: a cadastral or land-registry map showing numbered land parcels and property boundaries
prompts.aerial_plot: an aerial or satellite photograph of a plot of land or property seen from above
prompts.location_map: a road or location map showing streets and a place marker
